customers_say: Customers find this water purifier excellent, with features including TDS control, multiple taste adjustment options, and a modern LED light design. They appreciate the free installation and consider it good value for money, with one customer noting it will pay off in three years. The purifier's reliability receives mixed feedback - while many say it functions well, some report it stops working properly.

reviews.author: Gaurav Atravalkar
reviews.title: A perfect water purifier
reviews.body: I would simply say this is a great and the best product...!!! The best part is the adjustment of taste and mode as per the tds of the input water. The trust of atomberg, quick installation support and post sales service makes this a awesome product. Lastly affordable service prices and no dedicated amc makes it value for money. I recommend this product for all the new buyers and those who are looking for upgrading the purifier.

reviews.author: Shiv
reviews.title: Worthy buy!!!
reviews.body: Review after 9 months of use Loved the quality and installation service support by the team. Excellent customer service by the technician who checked and set things. The water pressure motor was a great added benefit. Thank you! Great value for money with latest checks possible on mobile app for status of filters etc. TDS options works like a charm with settings. Simple and elegant design with sturdy materials. Love the LED display. Considerable change in taste and quality of water, healthy because there are fewer cases of flu/throat infections after installation. Previous equipment could not

reviews.author: Himanshu
reviews.title: Excellent intelligent water purifier
reviews.body: I am using atomberg intellon water purifier since last 5 months. I was looking for water purifier where we can set output TDS level, infact prepared design of making myself! As very low TDS level in standard RO is not good for health especiallywhen you have fluctuating input TDS levels due to mixing of borewell and municipalcorporation suppied river water. This atomberg purifier has performed excellently till now. We can set output tds levels through App. It shows health of each filter which is in range of 80% to 97%, Hope to get good performance in future also.

reviews.author: Placeholder
reviews.title: GOOD SERVICE BY ATOMBERG Technician
reviews.body: I recently purchased the Atomberg water purifier and I am completely satisfied with its performance. The design is modern and fits perfectly in my kitchen. The purification quality is very good and the water tastes fresh and clean. The noise level is moderate and does not disturb at all during operation. The purifier also includes a TDS control feature, which helps maintain the right minerals in the water and improves the taste. After using it, we feel the water is much safer and better for health and daily drinking. Installation service was also excellent. Technician Kamleshbhai did a very go

reviews.author: Piyush
reviews.title: Atomberg water purifier
reviews.body: I recently purchased the Atomberg Water Purifier and I’m extremely satisfied with my experience so far. The installation process was smooth and hassle-free, and the design looks modern and fits perfectly in my kitchen. Most importantly, the water quality is excellent — it tastes fresh, clean, and gives me confidence about its purity. The purifier works efficiently and quietly, which is a big plus. I also appreciate the build quality and the overall value for money this product offers. It feels like a reliable long-term investment for my family’s health.
